title: centaurea rigoi
intro: Centaurea rigoi, also known as Rigol's knapweed, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe, for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea rigoi are believed to include relief from pain and fever, as well as support for the immune system. Centaurea rigoi is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
